resource.description: Allow-all AccessPolicy bound to the `fhir-compare` Client. mock.health's benchmark and conformance runners authenticate as this client via HTTP Basic (`fhir-compare:fhir-compare`) — replaces the external auth-proxy-aidbox sidecar we used before. Same shape as Health Samurai's own benchmark (HealthSamurai/fhir-server-performance-benchmark), just with a linked client so requests carry an identity like a real deployment.
